offer: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, inefficient scheduling causes project delays. We automate scheduling and confirmations instead of manual scheduling and confirmation processes.
problem: Inefficient scheduling leads to project delays and increased costs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on scheduling challenges
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Join forums for construction project management tools
try_it: Let users try simple scheduling interface with 1-3 tasks
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Offer early access to first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving of common scheduling templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing projects
Simplify onboarding process for new users
